scanPromptBody: Recent media from the last {{defaultScanWindowMonths}} months is checked locally in batches for duplicate, blurry, and similar items, and the results stay on this page.
scanScopeHint: The default scan starts with the last {{defaultScanWindowMonths}} months, then backfills older media until the whole library is covered. Return to the app to reattach to the current progress.
scanProgressFootnote: Duplicate, blurry, and similar candidates stay below while normal media gradually drops out.
scanResultFootnote: Results stay on the page under the local first-pass rules so filtering, review, cleanup, or keep actions can continue immediately.
scanExhaustedBody: Continuing the scan picks up from media older than the previous batch; once the whole library is covered, only new or changed media is processed.
scanAllCompleteBody: The current media library is fully covered. Only new or changed media needs another scan later.
stateReadyBody: Find duplicate, blurry, and similar items. Results stay here for review.
stateScanningBody: Review the current batch while the device continues scanning locally.
stateRecognizingBody: Scan reached 100%. Sorting the local findings into review groups.
stateResultBody: Reviewed {{count}} media items in this batch
autoResumeScanNotice: Detected that the Android local scan is still running. The current batch has been reattached automatically.
entryPermissionGrantedBody: The library is ready for local scanning
entryLoadingBody: Reading local media and staging the next session
entryReadyHint: Photos and videos stay local during scan and cleanup review
entryLocalOnly: Processed locally, no media is uploaded
entryLocalOnlyCaption: Every recognition and cleanup step stays on the device
entrySupportsPhotosAndVideosCaption: Duplicate, blurry, and similar items are reviewed together
entryFastLocalScan: Return to the page to reattach to the current batch progress
